utterance: I had a 1:1 with Sarah on 2026-03-15

expected_behavior.rationale: 1:1 is an Event entity; date anchors it via OCCURRED_ON

utterance: We shipped MIST MVP on 2026-04-22

expected_behavior.rationale: shipped MVP is a Milestone (per Rule 11); explicit date triggers OCCURRED_ON

utterance: I attended a conference yesterday

expected_behavior.rationale: conference is an Event; relative date 'yesterday' resolves against reference_date and anchors via OCCURRED_ON

utterance: I joined Slalom on 2024-01-08

expected_behavior.rationale: joining a company is a life Event; ISO date triggers OCCURRED_ON

utterance: MIST has 1488 tests

expected_behavior.rationale: MIST is a Project; 1488 is a count Metric attached via HAS_METRIC

utterance: Hermes-4 hits 88 tokens per second on this hardware

expected_behavior.rationale: Hermes-4 is a Technology; throughput is a Metric (value 88, unit tokens/sec)

utterance: My Q2 goal is shipping 5 new features

expected_behavior.rationale: User HAS_GOAL Goal; the '5 features' target attaches to the Goal via HAS_METRIC

utterance: Whisper base achieves 95 percent accuracy on LibriSpeech

expected_behavior.rationale: Whisper is a Technology; 95% accuracy is a benchmark Metric (value 95, unit percent, context LibriSpeech)

utterance: I read ADR-007 yesterday and I agree with the framing

expected_behavior.rationale: ADR-007 is a Document; user read it -- REFERENCES_DOCUMENT edge

utterance: I just finished the Reflexion paper

expected_behavior.rationale: Reflexion paper is a Document; user finished reading it -- REFERENCES_DOCUMENT

utterance: I'm halfway through Designing Data-Intensive Applications

expected_behavior.rationale: DDIA is a Document (book); user is reading it -- REFERENCES_DOCUMENT

utterance: I reviewed RFC 7519 yesterday

expected_behavior.rationale: RFC 7519 is a Document (spec); user reviewed it -- REFERENCES_DOCUMENT

utterance: Cluster 8 came after Cluster 7 wrapped

expected_behavior.rationale: Cluster 8 PRECEDED_BY Cluster 7 -- explicit temporal ordering between two milestones

utterance: I started a new role after 2026-01-01

expected_behavior.rationale: starting a role is an Event; PRECEDED_BY a Date target ('after 2026-01-01')

utterance: The retro happened after the launch

expected_behavior.rationale: retro PRECEDED_BY launch -- two Event entities with explicit ordering

utterance: We shipped the MVP after 2026-03-01

expected_behavior.rationale: shipping MVP is a Milestone; PRECEDED_BY a Date target

utterance: Today is 2026-04-24

expected_behavior.rationale: Date entity may be created but no Event/Milestone is present, so OCCURRED_ON would be a false positive

utterance: I have 3 books on my shelf

expected_behavior.rationale: '3' is a count of personal possessions, not a benchmark/measurement of a graph entity; books-on-shelf is passive ownership, not document engagement -- so HAS_METRIC and REFERENCES_DOCUMENT would both be false positives. Replaces the original 'It is 3 hours until my flight' which the model failed via OCCURRED_ON over-extraction (treated 'flight' as a future Event) -- different failure mode than the HAS_METRIC trap the probe was designed to catch.

utterance: I should write more documents this quarter

expected_behavior.rationale: 'documents' is generic intent, not a specific Document entity; REFERENCES_DOCUMENT would be a false positive

utterance: I work in the morning and afternoon

expected_behavior.rationale: morning/afternoon are time-of-day patterns, not events with temporal ordering; PRECEDED_BY would be a false positive
